name: Apagroup
desc: Apa Group lider inteligentnej automatyki przemysowej i systemow zarzdzania budynkami. Sprawd nasze realizacje. Szybki kontakt: +48 32 231 64 43.APA sp. z o.o. jest dostawc kompleksowych rozwizan dla brany motoryzacyjnej. Jest rownie producentem platformy NAZCA, NAZCA4.0 oraz VISION BMS. Systemy pozwalaj w peni zarzdza najwaniejszymi procesami w przedsibiorstwach..Zajmujemy si opracowaniem technologii, ktora uatwia codzienne ycie. Dziaamy na rynku nowoczesnej automatyki przemysowej i systemow zarzdzania budynkami. Posiadamy ponad 15 lat dowiadczenia i dziesitki udanych wdroen dla instytucji, osob prywatnych, gmin i zakadow przemysowych na caym wiecie. Do naszych klientow nale giganci wiatowego przemysu. Intensywnie wspopracujemy z uczelni badawcz - Politechnik lsk. Stworzylimy kilka produktow, w tym przeomow platform Nazca do realizacji zadan zwizanych z automatyzacj budynkow - BMS (Building Management System) i Nazca 4.0 dla wdroenia koncepcji Industry 4.0 oraz automatyzacji procesow tworzc organizacje zarzdzane przez analiz danych (Data Driven Organisation). Nasze rozwizania wyronia intuicyjno, niezawodno i innowacyjno. Przenosimy dowiadczenia i know-how zdobyte w brany przemysowej na obszar inteligentnej automatyki stosowanej w biznesie, yciu codziennym i miastach. W centrum naszych dziaan zawsze znajduje si czowiek i jego potrzeby. Dziaamy wszdzie tam, gdzie trzeba oswoi technologi i uczyni j bardziej uyteczn. Gdzie liczy si pomys i praktyczny wymiar projektu. Naszym celem jest uczynienie przestrzeni miejskiej bardziej przystpnej. Wymylenie jej na nowo. Dla Ciebie. APA Group Your Life. Reinvented.

name: Kieback & Peter Gmbh & Co. Kg Techn. Byro
desc: Wir sorgen fyr mehr Komfort, Effizienz und Sicherheit im Gebaude. Mit einfachen Losungen vernetzen wir Gebaudetechnik zu einem smarten Gesamtsystem. This company is engaged in the production and distribution of control equipment for heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems in Germany and internationally, as well as for building automation and building management. It was founded by Erich Kieback and Paul Peter in 1927. Its head office is located in Berlin, Germany.The company's products include building management system, room automation, control valves and servodrives, automation stations and transducers. Its production operation takes place in two locations in Germany, in Mittenwalde (Brandenburg) and Trier. It also offers integration and project planning, maintenance and repairs, 24 hour call service, professional test and support service, energy services and energy controlling, central error message service, facility management, and central repair service.The company is one of the leading suppliers of equipment and systems solutions in heating, ventilation and air-conditioning (HVAC) as well as in building management. In Germany, the company offers comprehensive schooling and training on all aspects of digital control technology and building management systems (BMS).It has branch and technical offices located in Dresden, Rostock, Erfurt, Leipzig and Magdeburg.The company is also active in Austria, France, the Netherlands, Switzerland and China. The company has numerous partners in other countries in Europe. SMART BUILDINGS are ORANGE. Pioneer of building automation since 1927 Kieback&Peter is a leading expert in building automation. WE MAKE BUILDINGS SMARTER AND MORE SUSTAINABLE Buildings play an important role all over the world not only for the environment and the economy. Also for us humans they have a vital significance as the central places where we live and work. OUR CLAIM We want everyone to benefit from more comfort, efficiency and safety in the building. This is why we take care of commercial and public buildings and develop a tailor-made solution for each of them. With the help of soft- and hardware, we combine heating, ventilation, air conditioning, security technology and other technologies to create one optimized system. OUR CUSTOMERS Kieback&Peter takes care of prestige objects such as the Berliner Reichstag as well as the school next door. Our top international customers include Airbus, Daimler and Volkswagen. Thousands of references speak for themselves. OUR VALUES HIGH-QUALITY "Made in Germany" SUSTAINABLE in the sense of certified sustainability management DEDICATED we look after your buildings throughout their entire life cycle DOWN-TO-EARTH the size of a group, but at the heart of a family of medium-sized companies OUR BENEFITS safe and fair working conditions opportunities and individual spaces for beginners, young professionals, old hands, nerds and cross-heads an attractive salary Kieback&Peter has received several awards as an exemplary employer and is an official IHK training company. Become part of the family! Find your job and apply at our career-site (link below). Kieback&Peter: Experte fyr Gebaudeautomation | Kieback&Peter.

name: Enocean Gmbh (Smart Building Expo)
desc: EnOcean ist Erfinder und Hersteller der preisgekrnten patentierten Grundlagentechnologie batterielose Funksensorik“, die aufgrund ihrer Wartungsfreiheit und Flexibilitt zur Kostenreduktion in Gebuden und Industrieanlagen fyhren.EnOcean GmbH is the developer of the patented energy harvesting wireless technology. Headquartered in Oberhaching, near Munich, the company produces and markets self-powered wireless sensor solutions for maintenance-free applications in the Internet of Things, which are used for building and industrial automation, smart homes and LED lighting control. The EnOcean products are based on miniaturized energy converters, ultra-low power electronics and robust radio technology in open standards. Over 350 leading product manufacturers worldwide have been relying on EnOcean wireless modules for their system solutions for more than15 years and have installed EnOcean-enabled products in one million buildings around the world. name: Ecava Sdn. Bhd.
desc: Pioneering Web SCADA with Ecava IGX since 2005. Ecava started in 2005 with the mission to bring web technologies to industrial automation by building a new web based SCADA from the ground up. Formed by three engineers with extensive experience in automation engineering and development, Ecava IntegraXor (Ecava IGX) was created - a web SCADA solution that helps engineers and system integrators to easily build, manage and control machines remotely. In 2010, Ecava presented a white paper on the usage of web technologies and scaleable vector graphics (SVG) at the SVG Open in Paris. Ecava also holds two U.S. patents under its Ecava IGX product since 2012. Engineers and system integrators alike value Ecava IGX for being the leanest and fastest system in transmitting heavy industrial control data through a latency network. This is achieved through its adoption of pure web technologies like HTML5 and CSS3 for real-time graphic visualization and remote automation control. Its versatility allows for borderless control through any web browser with and is accessible with any PC as well as Apple and Android smart devices. The combination of having a lean architecture, fast processing, enhanced versatility and expert support has seen Ecava IGX being utilized in industries like oil and gas, power, energy, waste management, water management, utility, mining and building automation. Ecava has impressively gained popularity and a fast-growing customer base globally, with its core customers coming from North America, Europe and Australia. Ecava has also actively collaborated with the U.S. Cyber Emergency Response Team in mitigating vulnerabilities in critical systems, from a mining machinery in South Africa, to semiconductor facility in Singapore. View an online demo of Ecava IGX at https://www.integraxor.com/scada-demo/ Download a copy of Ecava IGX with free trial at https://www.integraxor.com/download-scada/ Contact Us at: sales@integraxor.com.

name: sierramonitor
desc: Established in 1914, MSA Safety Incorporated is the global leader in the development, manufacture, and supply of safety products that protect people and facility infrastructures. Many MSA products integrate a combination of electronics, mechanical systems, and advanced materials to protect users against hazardous or life-threatening situations. The company's comprehensive product line is used by workers around the world in a broad range of markets, including the oil, gas, and petrochemical industry, the fire service, the construction industry, mining, and the military. MSA's core products include self-contained breathing apparatus, fixed gas and flame detection systems, portable gas detection instruments, industrial head protection products, firefighter helmets, protective apparel, and fall protection devices. With 2021 revenues of $1.4 billion, MSA employs approximately 5,200 people worldwide. The company is headquartered north of Pittsburgh in Cranberry Township, Pa., and has manufacturing operations in the United States, Europe, Asia, and Latin America. With more than 40 international locations, MSA realizes approximately half of its revenue from outside North America. For more information, visit MSA's website at www.MSAsafety

desc: At Monnit, we aim to bridge the gap between industry and technology through the Internet of Things by empowering businesses with low-cost, simple sensor solutions to monitor anything. name: Omniflex - Remote Monitoring Specialists
desc: Omniflex is a global, industry-leading designer and manufacturer of electronic instrumentation for the oil & gas, petro-chemical, nuclear, mining, infrastructure, utilities and pharmaceutical sectors, with over 55 years in the business. We specialise in remote monitoring in harsh industrial environments. This includes web based remote monitoring solutions including IIoT, industrial networking, remote I/O systems, utilities monitoring, radiological surveillance systems, cathodic protection systems, signal conditioning, and alarm and event management. Our teams of engineers have a passion for problem solving and can work with you to select the most suitable product from our wide range and develop cost-effective solutions that reliably deliver results. The company was founded in 1965 and was originally named CONLOG, developing an enviable reputation in systems integration and product development for the process control and instrumentation market. Omniflex now has offices in South Africa, United Kingdom and Australia, and the company s products are sold on 5 continents through a range of carefully selected solutions partners. Products include such well known brands as Data2Desktop web based remote monitoring, Omnergy Utilities management solutions, Omni16 alarm annunciators, Maxiflex process automation, Teleterm remote I/O and RTU systems, and Omniterm signal conditioning and remote I/O systems.

name: Abriox Inc
desc: Abriox is a dynamic high technology company with European and international headquarters in the UK and US headquarters in Ohio. Our core expertise is the development of remote monitoring systems for utilities and we work with some of the world s biggest oil, gas, water, petrochemical and other chemical companies. Our instrumentation helps improve the efficiency of their fuel distribution networks by providing demonstrable asset management, safety, economic, environmental and compliance benefits. Our award winning innovative products include: MERLIN is the world s leading remote CP monitoring system, supported by iCPSM and CPSM database software. Installed on every continent, MERLIN is the system of choice to provide accurate and timely information on the cathodic protection of transmission and distribution pipelines. OSPREY is the world s most advanced remote gas pressure monitor, supported by our PressureTrac database software. It allows real-time analysis to take place and for pressure data to be exported into network validation software automatically for planning and emergency response to poor pressure problems. We work with some of the world s biggest companies involved in the exploration, production and transportation of gas and liquid hydrocarbons and of petrochemicals. Contact us today for more information on how Abriox remote monitoring systems can improve your network management.

name: Sensoroutlet.Com
desc: Sensor Outlet, a division of Kibog Inc. (www.kibog.com), is a distributor and reseller of Remote Monitoring and Internet of Things (IoT) solutions. We work with manufacturers of ready-to-use, self-installable, low-cost wireless sensor solutions for commercial and industrial use and function as their distribution channel. We can also develop custom solutions for customers that require it. Some of the solutions we provide include: - Remotely monitor a variety of variables (i.e. temperature, motion, humidity, vibration, etc.); - Receive alerts based on user-defined conditions; - Develop a higher understanding of their business; and - Prevent unnecessary waste. Our goal is to provide solutions that save you time, money, and headaches by alerting you via text, email, and/or phone call when something goes wrong, potentially saving you thousands of dollars in damages to produce, inventory, infrastructure, and more. Products from our suppliers are fully tested, FCC, CE and/or IC compliant for use anywhere in the world.

name: Equinox Eur Bv
desc: Equinox MHE is a system integrator for internal logistics, providing end-to-end supply chain solutions all over the world. By combining in-house manufactured systems with integrations from our competent partners we offer our customer end-to-end solutions that realize their ambitions. In the early days, we started out as a software company focused on integration and warehouse management systems. When lead times for sorting systems and other material handling systems began to stretch, we decided on manufacturing them in-house in the Netherlands. Since then we have built up a wide experience in manufacturing and integrating numerous installations. Projects are envisioned by our system design team and made tangible by engineers and mechanics. The solutions we have installed all over the world are tried and tested in the fashion, e-commerce, and postal market. In these highly competitive markets we challenge ourselves to stay ahead by investing in innovation, partners and our customers. While we have grown over the years from a handful to over 60 employees, we still take pride in our core values: partnership, know-how and our Dutch straightforwardness. The relationship with our customers and partners has always been our number one priority. Our first line of contact with our customers is our support team. Within logistics, down time is the enemy. Our support engineers ensure our 200 installations all over the world are running smoothly every day. By solely working with competent partners that value quality as much as we do, we are certain all our installations live up to the expectations. Are you struggling with a intralogistical challenge Call +31 252 52 60 00.
